meta.history: Harness lockdown (H01–H07) and router restructure (R01–R07) are complete. Their rationale is in DECISIONS.md (D01–D09, D16) and the build log in MEMORY.md. This file tracks LIVE scope only.

feature_work.title: A2P 10DLC SMS approval
feature_work.notes: Blocks all SMS-dependent features (F02, F03, F04). Status: awaiting carrier approval. See clients/adkins/notes.md.

feature_work.title: Adkins Lead Qualification workflow
feature_work.verify: TODO: confirm GHL workflow exists via GHL API call
feature_work.notes: Trigger: contact form submit. Action: send SMS via LC Phone. Condition: if responds → tag 'Qualified', else 'Nurture'.

feature_work.title: No-response follow-up workflow
feature_work.verify: TODO: confirm GHL workflow exists via GHL API call
feature_work.notes: Trigger: contact created 48h ago, no response. Action: send follow-up email or SMS.

feature_work.title: Trial booking automation
feature_work.verify: TODO: confirm GHL + Square integration via API call
feature_work.notes: Trigger: contact qualified. Action: send SMS with 3 time slots (from Square). If lead selects → create appointment in Square.

feature_work.title: Social auto-posting (CSV → GHL)
feature_work.verify: TODO: confirm CSV upload + GHL social integration
feature_work.notes: Load posts via Advanced CSV. Deploy to Adkins initially, then scale to other locations.

feature_work.title: Scale to Bellevue, Gretna, Elkhorn
feature_work.verify: TODO: confirm all 4 locations have workflows deployed
feature_work.notes: After Omaha validation (30-day proof). Tag-based filtering per location in same GHL sub-account.

feature_work.title: Onboard second client
feature_work.notes: Implements scripts/onboard-subaccount.sh. Adkins is proof; second client validates the snapshot and onboard script.

ops_automation.title: Cross-client bulk reporting loop
ops_automation.notes: NOT A LOOP YET. Blocked by ≥2 active clients. Will become a capped daily loop once feature work is done.

notes: WIP=1: only one item in-flight at a time (enforced by scripts/check-docs.mjs). dependsOn enforces sequencing; every id referenced resolves within this file. Verify command per item. Completed harness/router history → DECISIONS.md.
